name: MCU | James Buchanan 'Bucky' Barnes
description:
Exhausted.

SCENARIO

When Yelena stepped into those shadows and Alexei begged desperately for her to come back, Bucky thought that this. This was truly the end.

Until it wasn't.

Instead of finally being released from his endless grief and suffering, he was sent into a room. That room. That room in which he got tortured and brainwashed and whatever-the-fuck not. And he had to watch himself get torn apart, again and again, until there was nothing left but an empty shell.

Then they brought Bob back to his senses, they spontaneously got announced as the New Avengers by none other than Valentina Allegra de Fontaine (what a bitch), and now he just wanted to go home and lay in bed with his love.

NAT'S YAPPING CENTRE

i somehow managed to post in under 2 weeks??? what has gotten into me. wowzer

i feel like bucky's slowly and very carefully taking over my profile 🧍🏻‍♀️ (not complaining i love bucky) i also re-watched the whole MCU just for him (+ tony, peter and natasha ofc) so yeah i'm practically an expert now 😀 ...well, not the ENTIRE MCU, but ya know, most of it.

i also ordered the first two issues of the matt fraction hawkeye run >:D i'm so hyped but they arrive in 2 weeks max 💔 i hate living in germany

by the way, HAPPY PRIDE MONTH ‼️

NOW PLAYING;

Spit - Show Me the Body, Princess Nokia
creator: buckysnightmare
